title: cypripedium guttatum subsp. yatabeanum
intro: Cypripedium guttatum subsp. yatabeanum, also known as the Yellow Lady's Slipper, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cypripedium guttatum subsp. yatabeanum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and processing the rhizome and roots to create teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
